{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/ai-collaborations/ensembles/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Ансамбли проектов"
tags:
  * ai-collaborations
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Ансамбли проектов

_Файлов:_ 9

h2. Содержание

* [[1-agentic-knowledge-os|1-agentic-knowledge-os.md]] — 
* [[2-distributed-agent-workshop|2-distributed-agent-workshop.md]] — 
* [[3-forensic-rag|3-forensic-rag.md]] — 
* [[4-web-to-knowledge-pipeline|4-web-to-knowledge-pipeline.md]] — 
* [[5-agent-firewall|5-agent-firewall.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[6-continuous-eval-loop|6-continuous-eval-loop.md]] — 
* [[7-domain-agent-app-factory|7-domain-agent-app-factory.md]] — 
* [[8-budget-aware-intelligence-stack|8-budget-aware-intelligence-stack.md]] — 
* [[9-ambient-team-agent|9-ambient-team-agent.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.17)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.14)
